title: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

options.title: Linger
options.description: Gain [green]2[/green] Max HP. Take [red]escalating damage[/red] (starts at [red]4[/red], increases by [red]1[/red] per linger).

notes:
[gold]Multi-stage event with escalating stakes.[/gold] The event has two initial choices: Immerse or Abstain.

[gold]Abstain:[/gold] Immediately heal [green]10[/green] HP and end the event with flavor text about declining the waters.

[gold]Immerse & Linger Loop:[/gold] Choosing Immerse (or Linger after immersion) executes the same action: gain [green]2[/green] Max HP and take [red]unblockable, unpowered[/red] damage. The damage sequence is: [red]3[/red] (first immerse) → [red]4[/red] (first linger) → [red]5[/red] → [red]6[/red] → [red]7[/red] → [red]8[/red] → [red]9[/red] → [red]10[/red] → [red]11[/red] → [red]12[/red] (capped after 9 lingerings). Each subsequent choice shows the next Linger and Exit options with updated damage values.

[gold]Page Progression:[/gold] After immersing, you see the IMMERSE page. Each time you linger, the game increments a counter (LINGER1 through LINGER9) with corresponding flavor text showing escalating heat, psychological effects, and eventually transcendence. These counters cap at 9 stages.

[gold]Death Warning:[/gold] If the next linger would deal fatal damage, a special DEATH_WARNING page appears with red sine-wave text: "[sine][red]If you bathe any longer you will die.[/red][/sine]" You can still choose to Linger (instant death) or Exit safely.

[gold]Exit:[/gold] Available after the initial immerse and at any linger stage. Ends the event immediately.
